About: It is about an Iranian royal dynasty that was the last to rule Iran before the country's monarchy was overthrown in the Iranian Revolution in 1979.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Pahlavi scripts of the Middle Persian language.
CreatedBy: It was created by Reza Khan.
FoundedBy: It was founded by Reza Shah Pahlavi.
HasA: It has Iranian nationalism rooted in the pre-Islamic era.
It has a pluralistic period from 1941 to 1953.
It has a brief one party state period.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being the last royal dynasty to rule Iran before the monarchy was overthrown in the Iranian Revolution in 1979.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by British and clerical opposition.
IsA: It is an Iranian royal dynasty.
It is a non-aristocratic Iranian soldier of Mazanderani origin.
KnownAs: It is known as Xândâne Pahlavi.
KnownFor: It is known for espousing Iranian nationalism rooted in the pre-Islamic era.
NamedAfter: It is named after the Pahlavi scripts of the Middle Persian language.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Iranian Revolution in 1979.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Iran.
It occurred in pre-Islamic Iran.
It occurred in the Sasanian Empire.
It occurred in the Achaemenid Empire.
It occurred in Turkey.
It occurred in Mazandaran Province.
It occurred in Savadkuh County.
It occurred in Qajar Iran.
It occurred in the Caucasus.
It occurred in the Russian Empire.
